content_body: We had a fantastic time in Atlanta, despite a few days of foul weather. Luckily, there are plenty of inside activities to do in Atlanta. We loved Urban Retreat—it was spacious, and exactly what we are used to in our own home, so it was easy to feel at home. The house is beautifully decorated and has everything you would need in the kitchen. Linens are top quality—I even had to sneak a peak at some of the brands! ;) The property is close to everything and only streets away from the Virginia Highland area, which is plentiful in dining and shopping. Also, only a short drive from main attractions like the aquarium, World of Coke, and downtown. We would definitely stay again.
title: Spacious, Excellent Location
